frame_eqs_str: a['wave_myster']=(a['bass_att']-1); a['mv_r']=(Math.sin((1.39+(a['time']*1.55)))*a['bass_att']); a['mv_g']=(Math.sin((1.59+(a['time']*1.75)))*a['bass_att']); a['mv_b']=(Math.sin((1.79+(a['time']*1.95)))*a['bass_att']); a['wave_r']=a['mv_g']; a['wave_b']=a['mv_r']; a['wave_g']=a['mv_b']; a['rot']=(a['rot']+((a['bass_att']-1)*0.2)); a['decay']=((Math.abs(mod(a['time'],20))>0.00001)?(0.99):(0.5)); a['q1']=a['rot']; a['q2']=mod(a['time'],20);
